---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, target, or improvement to Oryon
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want to add or change?

<!-- Be specific. "Add RSI feature", "Add FutureMaxDrawdown target", "Improve FeaturePipeline to support X"... -->

## Type

- [ ] New feature (streaming transform)
- [ ] New target (forward label)
- [ ] Pipeline or API improvement
- [ ] Other

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? -->

## Formula or specification (if applicable)

<!-- For features/targets: provide the formula and any edge cases (None propagation, warm-up period...). -->

## Are you willing to implement it?

- [ ] Yes, I will open a PR
- [ ] No, I am requesting it
